    N = length(nums),
    Depths = [depth(X) || X <- nums],
    FenwickTrees = [init_fenwick(N) || _ <- lists:seq(0, 5)],
    populate_fenwick(FenwickTrees, Depths, 0, N),
    process_queries(Queries, FenwickTrees, Depths).

depth(X) when X == 1 -> 0;
depth(X) ->
    Popcount = bit_count(X),
    1 + depth(Popcount).

bit_count(0) -> 0;
bit_count(X) ->
    case X band 1 of
        1 -> 1 + bit_count(X div 2);
        0 -> bit_count(X div 2)
    end.

init_fenwick(N) ->
    lists:seq(0, N).

update_fenwick(Tree, Index, Delta) ->
    Index =:= 0 -> Tree;
    Index =:= 1 -> Tree;
    update_fenwick(Tree, Index, Delta, 1, Tree).

update_fenwick(_, Index, Delta, I, Tree) when I > length(Tree) ->
    Tree;
update_fenwick(Tree, Index, Delta, I, Tree) ->
    NewI = I + I band 1,
    NewTree = lists:sublist(Tree, I-1) ++ [Tree[I] + Delta] ++ lists:nthtail(I, Tree),
    update_fenwick(NewTree, Index, Delta, NewI, NewTree).

query_fenwick(Tree, Index) ->
    Index =:= 0 -> 0;
    query_fenwick(Tree, Index, 0, Index, Tree).

query_fenwick(_, Index, Sum, I, Tree) when I > length(Tree) ->
    Sum;
query_fenwick(Tree, Index, Sum, I, Tree) ->
    NewSum = Sum + Tree[I],
    NewI = I - I band 1,
    query_fenwick(Tree, Index, NewSum, NewI, Tree).

range_query_fenwick(Tree, L, R) ->
    R_query = query_fenwick(Tree, R),
    L_query = query_fenwick(Tree, L-1),
    R_query - L_query.

populate_fenwick(Trees, Depths, Index, N) ->
    case Index of
        N -> Trees;
        _ ->
            Tree = Trees[Index],
            NewTree = update_fenwick(Tree, Index+1, 1),
            populate_fenwick([NewTree | tl(Trees)], Depths, Index+1, N)
    end.
